Trust & Security

Enterprise security. Industrial-grade data protection.

SAM4 is ISO 27001 certified, SOC 2 compliant, and built for OT environments where uptime and data integrity are non-negotiable.

Certified and audited

Third-party validation, not just promises. Our security posture is independently verified every year.

ISO 27001
Information Security
Certified ISMS covering all SAM4 operations. data handling, access control, incident response, and supplier management.
ISO 9001
Quality Management
Systematic quality management across hardware production, software development, and service delivery.
SOC 2 Type II
Trust Services
Independent audit of security, availability, and confidentiality controls across SAM4.

Data flow architecture

SAM4 collects only electrical current signals. no process data, no PLC access, no control system integration. The data path is one-directional by design.

SAM4 Edge
On-site hardware
→
TLS 1.3 tunnel
Encrypted transit
→
SAM4 Cloud
EU-hosted (Azure)
→
SAM4 Dashboard
HTTPS access

One-way data flow. SAM4 Edge pushes data outbound only. No inbound connections from the cloud to your OT network. No remote access to plant systems.

Network and OT security

SAM4 operates alongside your OT network without touching it. No SCADA integration, no PLC connections, no process control access.

Network isolation
SAM4 Edge devices sit on a separate VLAN or dedicated network segment. No bridging between IT, OT, and monitoring traffic.
Encrypted at every layer
TLS 1.3 in transit. AES-256 encryption at rest. Certificate-based device authentication. No shared secrets.
No inbound connections
The Edge device initiates all communication. Your firewall allows outbound HTTPS only. No open ports, no listening services.
Passive measurement only
CTs measure current non-invasively. SAM4 never writes to or controls any plant equipment. Read-only by physics.

Cloud platform security

SAM4's cloud infrastructure runs on Microsoft Azure in EU data centres, with defence-in-depth controls at every layer.

EU data residency
All customer data stored and processed in EU-based Azure data centres. GDPR-compliant data handling throughout.
Role-based access
Granular RBAC with SSO integration. Multi-factor authentication enforced. Session timeouts and audit logging on every action.
Continuous monitoring
24/7 infrastructure monitoring, automated vulnerability scanning, and regular penetration testing by independent firms.

IT/OT gatekeeper checklist

The questions your security team will ask. and the answers they need to approve SAM4 deployment.

  • Does it touch the control network? No. Separate VLAN, outbound-only.
  • Can it control plant equipment? No. Passive current measurement only.
  • Where is data stored? EU-based Azure data centres.
  • Is data encrypted? TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest.
  • Does it require open firewall ports? No. Outbound HTTPS (443) only.
  • Is it independently audited? ISO 27001 and SOC 2 Type II certified.
  • Can we restrict user access? Yes. RBAC with SSO and MFA.
  • What data does it collect? Electrical current waveforms only. No process data.

Security FAQ

No. SAM4 measures electrical current through passive CTs. It has no physical or logical connection to control systems, PLCs, or SCADA networks. The measurement is non-invasive and read-only by design.
The SAM4 Edge device buffers data locally and resumes upload when connectivity returns. No data is lost. The asset continues running normally. SAM4 never affects plant operations.
SAM4 is a cloud-native platform. On-premise deployments are available for enterprise customers with specific regulatory requirements. Contact our team to discuss options.
Our ISO 27001 ISMS includes a documented incident response procedure. Customers are notified within 24 hours of any confirmed security incident affecting their data. We conduct post-incident reviews and publish findings to affected customers.
Yes. We provide ISO 27001 certificates, SOC 2 reports, data processing agreements, and a detailed security whitepaper to customers and prospects under NDA. Use the form below to request access.

Request security documentation

Get our ISO 27001 certificate, SOC 2 report, data processing agreement, and security whitepaper. Everything your IT team needs to approve SAM4.

Request Security Docs

Monitoring the assets your sensors can't reach.
